subcodes.first_line: O Friend! We have remembered thee with a remembrance that shall endure through the perpetuity of the Kingdom of God, the Lord of Lords. Verily, He is come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ح س ذکرناک بذکر یبقی بدوام ملکوت الله رب الارباب انه اتی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital
